author: Th3OTh3rGuy
name: sysnames
install_msg: TerminalNames cog loaded. Run `[p]terminalnames` to configure or format members.
short: Formats nicknames to look like terminal prompts or executable files.
description: Automatically or manually formats Discord server nicknames into terminal-themed and executable/script-themed styles using monospace font character mapping.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store end-user data.
